enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a casual vlog update after having a female guest stay for four days, recounting visits to a Buffalo Bill museum and hot springs in Idaho Springs. He discusses reading Black Elk's account of touring with Buffalo Bill, a minor medical procedure on his neck, and his plans to refocus on a Google Earth mapping project.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Can only make videos when alone; loses train of thought with others in the room
Finds them interesting as a window into what Indigenous people were thinking during that era
Gained weight from buying more varied food with his mom; plans to refocus on healthy eating
Plans to finish Boulder County by end of April and stay focused on it exclusively

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm really high right now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I tried to do a video for the last few days but kept losing my train of thought because I had a guest over.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I can only do videos when there's nobody in the room.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My computer was acting weird and suddenly made a noise.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: When I move around, my computer thinks it's zooming.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't want to deal with my computer issues because I get stressed out.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I restarted my computer and am downloading the new version of Google Arts.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went hiking with my guest and then to the Buffalo Film Museum.

claims.subject: Buffalo Film Museum
claims.claim: The museum featured a guy who traveled the world for 35 years starting in 1868.

claims.subject: Buffalo Film Museum
claims.claim: He went to all the big cities in Europe and America with a big troop.

claims.subject: Buffalo Film Museum
claims.claim: I saw a list of all the picture people, including cowboys, camel people, and elephant people.

claims.subject: Black Elk
claims.claim: Black Elk was a Lakota medicine man and first cousin to Crazy Horse.

claims.subject: Black Elk
claims.claim: Black Elk toured with Buffalo Bill and went to England.

claims.subject: Black Elk
claims.claim: He stayed with a family in England and had a lot of experiences.

claims.subject: Jajronos
claims.claim: Jajronos traveled with Buffalo Bill and talked about the cozax being scary and hard to kill.

claims.subject: Jajronos
claims.claim: He was glad he was in America because in Mexico, he would be attacked all the time.

claims.subject: Jajronos
claims.claim: He saw little people from little islands who were naked and thought they shouldn't have been allowed to come like that.

claims.subject: Jajronos
claims.claim: He heard that Americans captured them to teach them civilization and then sent them back to teach others.

claims.subject: Buffalo Bill
claims.claim: Buffalo Bill had Indians in his troop with names like Running Buffalo Dick.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I soaked in the hot springs in Idaho Springs and it made me really relaxed.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got sick from milkshakes because I'm on antibiotics.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I had a neck issue that was calcified, and the doctor had to scrape it away.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I weighed over 200 pounds and had a lot of pus from the neck issue.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I felt sick after drinking alcohol and not staying hydrated.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I forgot to eat and only had a little sushi.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got really fat because I started eating too much food.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I used to eat rice and veggies for dinner and oatmeal and fruit for breakfast.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to focus on the Google Earth project and see how fat I can get.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to do a declaration video soon.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm tired and need to lie down and rest.
